name: HNA Innovation Co., Ltd.
summary: HNA Innovation Co., Ltd. provides tourism catering services in China. It engages in the development, construction, and operation of scenic spots in tourist resorts. The company also engages in the real estate business; management of tourist attractions and hotels; and yacht sales business. In addition, it provides investment management, marketing planning, exhibition, conference service, and business management consulting services; business information consulting services; sports activity organizations planning services; energy-saving services; and software development and information technology consulting services. The company was formerly known as HNA Innovation (Hainan) Co., Ltd. and changed its name to HNA Innovation Co., Ltd. in April 2017. HNA Innovation Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1999 and is based in Sanya, China.
